allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from app.config import get_config; print\(''Config OK:'', get_config\(\).app.title\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from main import create_app; print\(''App OK''\)")

Bash(python -c "import asyncio; import edge_tts; voices = asyncio.run\(edge_tts.list_voices\(\)\); ru = [v for v in voices if ''ru-RU'' in v[''ShortName'']]; [print\(v[''ShortName''], v[''Gender'']\) for v in ru]")
Bash(for f in marina_v2_bright.wav marina_v2_max.wav alena_v2_alive.wav)
Bash(powershell -Command "py C:\\CLOUDE_PR\\projects\\gen_tz_excel.py 2>&1; Remove-Item C:\\CLOUDE_PR\\projects\\gen_tz_excel.py; Remove-Item C:\\CLOUDE_PR\\projects\\hdr.txt")

hooks.prompt:
Check if Claude is about to stop prematurely. Evaluate:

1. Did the user ask for code changes? If yes - was code actually written/edited?
2. Did the user ask to run tests? If yes - were tests actually executed?
3. Did the user ask for multiple things? If yes - were ALL of them addressed?
4. Is there a TodoWrite list with pending items? If yes - those should be completed first.
5. Did Claude promise to do something and hasn't done it yet?

If ALL tasks are genuinely complete, respond: {"decision": "approve"}

If something is incomplete, respond:
{"decision": "block", "reason": "Incomplete", "systemMessage": "Ты не завершил все задачи. Проверь: [конкретно что не сделано]. Заверши ВСЁ перед остановкой."}

hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ -f ".planning/erp-migration/STATE.md" ]; then cp ".planning/erp-migration/STATE.md" ".planning/erp-migration/STATE.backup.md"; fi; echo "{\"continue\": true}"'
